title: Pin Electrical Characteristics
description: Datasheet electrical characteristics for a digital pin (switching thresholds and current limits)

v_ih_min.description: Minimum input voltage recognized as logic HIGH

v_il_max.description: Maximum input voltage recognized as logic LOW

v_oh_min.description: Minimum output voltage when driving logic HIGH

v_ol_max.description: Maximum output voltage when driving logic LOW

i_oh_max.description: Maximum source current when output is HIGH

i_ol_max.description: Maximum sink current when output is LOW
